source.title: Miles-Lords-Setite-Marcus-Chan-Sheet-V3-5-4

folderPath: SPECIAL CHARACTERS - Ask before handing these out.

Print Sheet: Elite Influence: Owners and Promoters in West Hollywood.
Stamina - No Wound Pen / Can't be Knocked out/down unless less Ptraits
Manipulation - +3 Social on Non Power uses dealing with focus.
Teddy Beer: Have a 6 pack from Marcus Jonak
Wits - +3 Mental on Non Power uses dealing with focus.
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet
7/5/3 traits, 3/2/1 backgrounds, 2/1/1 disciplines, 4/3/3/2/2/2/1/1/1/1 abilities, 30pts freebie, 7pts merits max, 7pts flaws max - All Merit/Flaw/Freebies must be on XP Spends Sheet

rows:
No one has ever given you an opportunity in life, you always had to create one. A mixed race child raised in East St. Louis, Illinois, your mother was an African-American prostitute, your father was whatever white man paid her the night you were conceived, you never know. You were raised in the seedy side of the industrial town, hustling from a young age just to make it. By the time you were in your teens you were already cornering in on the market of vice; drugs, alcohol and sex. You had charm and charisma to spare, no matter who tried to rough up or cut out your business, you always made something out of it. You were a businessman like that. Had you been legitimate, maybe you could have been a corporate CEO, but instead, you ran one of the largest prostitution rings in the St. Louis area. It made you a menace to the uptight, respectable crowd, but it made you enticing to the Followers of Set. That you didn't buy into the "religious" side of everything didn't seem to bother them, as far as they were concerned you would serve Set just fine.

Your move to Las Vegas was more a strategic business venture than for anything else. Vegas was a boomtown that profited on vice and there was opportunity aplenty for an enterprising vampire, such as yourself, all the more so because one one particular group completely controlled the city. That Nevada had legalized prostitution outside of Las Vegas offered you an opportunity to have a legitimate business for the first time, one that could have a windfall with the Kindred who wandered through Vegas. A stable of healthy, well-taken care of, professional employees means that you have a nice herd to pedal to any vampire in need, for a price. And, if they are looking for something special, unique, rare, well....that might cost extra. You run a discreet establishment, after all, very professional, catering to the average man and politician alike. You don't just give out handouts without making a deal, preferably one that benefits both sides - but you mostly.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
Setite, you two go way back and she is part of the draw to Vegas for you. She connects you with what you need for your business.
Assamite, he is known to wander into your establishment from time-to-time, mostly as it is on the outskirts of town.
Nosferatu, you've seen her act and like it. She's got all the dirt on everyone.

rows: You've been to Los Angeles and know what shit is going down there. This could be valuable intel to whoever comes into power...whoever that is. But you don't give anything up without a price. You can ask Jenn for a run down to information from LA that you can use to sell in whole or pieces to one or more people. Additionally, you can just make stuff up to sell for a nice profit. Obviously, not every information network is perfect!

You've had some do-gooders out there attempting to shut down establishments like yours, claiming that they are an abomination against God and that his holy fire will wipe the valley clean, blah, blah, blah. You've ignored it up till now, but it's starting to become and increasing problem with your business. You've had customers harrassed and attacked by them, and while you aren't up and up on your magic, some of it looks a bit weird to you. Find out who these people are and how you can work to stop them. As Benedic is no longer around ot pull his considerable influence, perhaps find others who can do so among the Camarilla and Giovanni and convince them to keep the vice in Sin City.
Eleanor wants to give the Setites cache in Las Vegas and give them equal standing to the Camarilla and the Giovanni here. Work with the others to help devise a plan to do so.

Gossip from around town:

- Some Vegas stuff you hear, Vegas was nearly wiped out of everyone who was there. The Giovanni, the Setites, the Camarilla, either hunted down or fled. There may be some rumors of the Tremere, deep underground, but they likely won't stay around. Everything you are hearing from your connections to Vegas is that this is a coordinated hit by people who knew what they were doing. Someone with ties to Feds says that they've heard through a back channel that there are people there who are fully aware of vampires and know everything. They don't know how, sounds like some X-files something, but they said that they new exactly who Anthony Sands, Schlomo Rothstein, Dante Giovanni and Eleanor Dusquene were and were they lived and what their influences were. Everything that they touched was hit in the last few weeks under a strike against this "Sinaloa Cartel". It's all a front to hunt down vampires.
- Some Giovanni stuff, Dante and Schlomo have gone off the radar. If they survived, no one knows. As you are talking to Setites in the area, however, you hear the Giovanni have been on the down low for weeks, before the fall of either Vegas or London. They are up to something, and one of the Setites in OC, Tina Davis, says that they are trying to bring around the end of the world or something. She doesn't get what that is all about, but she heard it from one of the Gio underlings.
- Camarilla gossip, just for fun, it's been noted that the marked lack of a strong Brujah presence in Los Angeles with the death of Petrovna seems to indicate that they don't really support her successor. Rumor is that they are perhaps choosing to go to Tara Kearney and her cause. She's openly said she'd reward anyone who could take out Petrovna and has said the same thing about Prince Eyre, saying that a princedom founded on Tremere machinations and Ventrue lies is no princedom at all, and that Eyre lacks the strength to withstand the threat that is coming. She's offering a haven to all those who want to escape from the chaos she predicts is going to happen in Eyre's court soon, because she's too much of an incompetent to hold it for long.

NOTE: Modified downtimes - 1 Herd to feed, 1 DT to cover William, 1 DT to find a blood bank to "rent" for the month, 1 DT to pull resources to cover the "rent", 1 influence action to use connections to smooth it over.

Connected with Jonak. Arranged 3 Resources for Garrett and Yesi. Jonak agreed to teach Cam Law if Marcus finds out about what is going on with the Gios in OC. Jonak gives Miles some Teddy beer for his use. Giving blood bank to Henry Fielding.

Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Modify Elite influence to be the Owners and Promoters of clubs in West Hollywood.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Modify retainer background, new retainer to replace the former retainer lost in Las Vegas. Retainer specialist in Leadership ability to better manage current herd and staff.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
Modify Haven background advantages: Luxury, Size, and Staff. Also Security as freebie from Security Ability.
Down time action to patrol. Just making it harder for other people to feed.
2 Downtime actions to investigate. Nothing specific, just sending out feelers for juicy drama to share at the next Elysium.
Done - I am not doing any more actions.
Spending 2 xp to purchase first dot of Lore.
Updating status to be "Recognized" also, updating blood bond: Raymond of Malkavian has taken one drink, and Joshua the Tremere has taken on drink. Both at last game.
Other, I'm going to feed in another way and it will be explained in the notes.

1st downtime action

Objective: Feeding action.

Narrative: taking Elenore's offer of Nigel's open invitation to feed in Orange County. Specifically in one of the storage closets of her nightclub on the southeast corner, any in flagrante delicto would naturally be mistaken as mid coitus to preserve the Masquerade.

2nd and 3rd downtime action

Objective: hide herd actions:

Narrative: Moving his Haven and relocating herds… ahem, er his entire staff to Orange County (posing as the head kept boy house sitting for his closeted rich sugar daddy to blend in with the rest of the filth). Create decoy havens in South Central which he neither stays nor boths remembering their locations.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1st Herd action

Objective: provide feeding for William the Tremere Primogen. 

Narrative: to provide William with the finest companionship to be 'seen around town' (His words, not Miles’) and offer intellectual substance in additional to nutrients. Vitae is clean and not tainted with drugs or Mile's blood. This would be considered 'rent to own' as Miles does not want the blood doll back.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

2nd Herd action 

Objective: provide feeding to Alberto the Brujah Primogen. 

Narrative: personally hand deliver blood bags hidden within McDonald bags a la UberEats. Blood will be donated by retainer whom had just fed from Miles, not enough to blood bond or invoke addictive blood mechanics for Alberto, but hopefully enough 'flavor' so he can taste for himself that this is the good stuff.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

3rd Herd action 

Objective: to create a sad excuse of a blood bank.

Narrative: to get the Prince off his back for requesting him to give her his non existent blood bank. Miles will purchase a “reasonably” secure dispensary in South Central (in cash), hire some semi-competent medical staff (also paid in cash… and an extensive background check to cover his own ass), acquire theatre tech crews from CSULA to furnish the interiors to further create the illusion of an upscale medical facility (also paid generous in cash to support the arts), and stocked with blood bags donated from his herd (enough to feed one kindred per herd mechanic). Night prior to opening, Miles will transfer full operations control over to Me Fielding of Ventrue and fulfill his obligations, then wash his hand of this mess and saunter away.

No paperwork has been filled with any organizations.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

Influence action

Objective: Hide herd actions.

Narrative: Using a combination of White Guilt and Hipster activism to raise awareness of rising HIV status in minorities communities, by creating #DonateSouthCentral movement causing influencers of WeHo to share their blood donation experience on social media. Starting a trend for millennials to go donate more and hopefully inspire other opportunistic copycats to create more pop-up blood banks in South Central as Instagram hotspots to draw attention away from him.

All while whispering through a glory hole in the back of a bath house...
Miles donated to the arts and helped inspired youths to be charitable.
Other, I'm going to feed in another way and it will be explained in the notes.
1 DT to contact NPC Marcus Jonak for Garret
1 DT to acquire item card: a bottle of Teddy Beer for the Malkavians
1 DT and 1 influence action to complete blood bank, transfer to Ventrue.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
1 herd action to feed William of Tremere
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
1 herd action to feed Bryan of Gangrel
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
1 herd action to feed Antonio the Brujah
Spending 6 xp: 3xp for serpentis level 2, 3xp for obfuscate level 2
Miles will not be feeding this month, will enter game hungry. Moving Haven from OC back to West Hollywood.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

Herd action: Overfeeding time.

Miles will be feeding from his herd twice a night, first feeding to break the fast, then meet Garret to take his vitae into blood bags, and feeding a second time after that to back to full.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1 Influence action: changing influence.

Shifting influence to Management of the Petit Ermitage hotel in West Hollywood.

1 downtime action: moving day.

Miles is finally moving out of OC, he will be staying at the Petit Ermitage. Half of his herd will be staying as other hotel guests, while the rest will be hired by management to be staff at the hotel.

2 downtime actions: hide

Miles is hiding his Haven. He will pretend to be visiting his fake havens in South Central and lead whom ever chosing to follow him on a nice wild goose chase.
Spending 6 XP to learn Mask of 1000 Faces.

1 DT action: contact Jonak. 

Contacting archon Jonak to update him regarding the Giovanni and New York.

2 DT actions: Secure the Petit Ermitage.

Additional actions to secure the location for Toreador clan to gather and meet, changing the security and video surveillance protocols to prevent masquerade issues.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.

1 Influence action: Hide Action.

Using influence to hide actions for Petit Ermitage.
Background - I am using a background to start or modify an action.
